first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions identify the same core gap: the candidate is a strong senior engineer but does not meet the Principal/Director-level experience or deep AI expertise required for the role. The minor variations in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and are not tied to the change in work location.
